memberdef.name: DDC_getset
DDCObj_methods
memberdef.initializer:
= {
{"execute", (PyCFunction)DDCObj_execute, METH_VARARGS, "execute(x) -> ndarray
" "
" "Mix input block with LO, then rate-convert.
" "
" " >>> import numpy as np
" " >>> from doppler import DDC
" " >>> obj = DDC(0.0, 0.25)
" " >>> y = obj.execute(np.zeros(4))
" " >>> y.dtype
" " dtype('complex64')
"}, {"reset", (PyCFunction)DDCObj_reset, METH_NOARGS, "reset() -> None
" "
" "Zero LO phase and filter history.
" "
" " >>> from doppler import DDC
" " >>> obj = DDC(0.0, 0.25)
" " >>> obj.reset()
"}, {"destroy", (PyCFunction)DDCObj_destroy, METH_NOARGS, "Release resources."}, {"__enter__", (PyCFunction)DDCObj_enter, METH_NOARGS, NULL}, {"__exit__", (PyCFunction)DDCObj_exit, METH_VARARGS, NULL}, {NULL} }

memberdef.name: DDCObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "ddc.DDC", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(DDCObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)DDCObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create a complex-input DDC.\n", .tp_methods = DDCObj_methods, .tp_getset = DDC_getset, .tp_new = DDCObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)DDCObj_init, }
